content.problemStatement:
Chef is really interested in the XOR operation. He wants to take a sequence A0,A1,‚Ä¶,AN‚àí1A_0, A_1, \ldots, A_{N-1}A0‚Äã,A1‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚àí1‚Äã and for each iii from 000 to K‚àí1K-1K‚àí1 inclusive (in this order, one by one), perform the following operation:


Let's denote a=Ai%Na = A_{i\%N}a=Ai%N‚Äã and b=AN‚àí(i%N)‚àí1b = A_{N-(i\%N)-1}b=AN‚àí(i%N)‚àí1‚Äã before this operation.
Change Ai%NA_{i\%N}Ai%N‚Äã to a‚äïba \oplus ba‚äïb, i.e. aaa XOR bbb.
Since Chef is busy, he asked you to find the final sequence he should get after performing these operations.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and KKK.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A0,A1,‚Ä¶,AN‚àí1A_0, A_1, \ldots, A_{N-1}A0‚Äã,A1‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚àí1‚Äã.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing NNN space-separated integers ‚Äï the elements of the final sequence.
